# PERF-139 positive: closure captures outer variable, forcing escape
lang: go
file: PERF-139-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func ClosureEscapeHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	secret := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	go func() {
		w.Write([]byte(secret))
	}()
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
